examples: He would tell her, "Oh, sinful wretch, who is spreading disease and filth like an open sewer."
The dialogue was all filth and innuendo.
The floor was covered in grease and filth.
Lagosians merely shrug their shoulders and set up their tents on the filth to party.
She previously directed a short film, Filth and Wisdom, which premiered in Berlin in 2008.
